visuals.title: High-Level Big Data ML Pipeline
visuals.description: Visual diagram for High-Level Big Data ML Pipeline
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Big Data Analysis Framework</text>

  <!-- Data Collection -->
  <rect x="60" y="80" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Collection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Data Storage -->
  <rect x="240" y="80" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Storage
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Data Processing -->
  <rect x="60" y="180" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Processing
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Data Analysis -->
  <rect x="240" y="180" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Analysis
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Visualization -->
  <rect x="150" y="250" width="120" height="50" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Visualization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Collection to Storage -->
  <path d="M180 105 H240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Storage to Processing -->
  <path d="M300 130 V180 H180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Processing to Analysis -->
  <path d="M180 205 H240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Analysis to Visualization -->
  <path d="M300 230 V250 H210" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Collection to Processing -->
  <path d="M120 130 V180" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" stroke-dasharray="4,4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
